verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You hold my every moment You calm my raging seas You walk with me through fire And you heal all my disease I trust in You Lord, I trust in You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I believe that You're my healer I believe You are all I need I believe, I believe that You're my portion I believe You're more than enough for me Jesus, You're all I need

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Nothing is impossible for You Nothing is impossible Nothing is impossible for You For You hold my world in Your hands
